description.overview: A versatile Spanish breed used for herding and water retrieval, the Spanish Water Dog has a distinctive curly coat and loyal personality.
description.history: The Spanish Water Dog originated in Spain.
description.temperament: Known for being diligent, affectionate, loyal.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their curly, woolly (cords when long) coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A versatile Spanish breed used for herding and water retrieval, the Spanish Water Dog has a distinctive curly coat and loyal personality.
